UG-117  CERTIFICATION. (a) The Manufacturer shall certify that all requirements of this Division have been met by signing the data report as required by UG-120. (b) The Inspector shall countersign after verifying compliance per UG-93. (c) Certification shall verify design requirements of UG-22. Except as permitted by UG-100, testing shall be per UG-99. Subject to the applicable marking requirements, UG-115 and UG-116 shall govern. For general reporting, see UG-94. Refer to UG-81 for material traceability.
